attributes.description: Evidence Inventory dashboard — what evidence do we have, when does it cover, and what kind of host did it come from? Top strip shows OS distribution (from Registry ProductName) and host roles (DC / File Server / Endpoint, combined from Registry ProductType + EVTX event-source signals). Below that, one row per artifact index showing every ingested source file with record count and first/last event timestamps. Use this as the first stop in any insider-threat investigation: answers 'do I have what I need, and what's the time window?' before you dive into the per-artifact dashboards.
